atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the right middle finger following a motor vehicle accident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the right middle finger approximately five days ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as sharp and constant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as exacerbated by pressure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states he became angry during the accident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states he flipped the driver of the other vehicle the bird.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states he was frustrated during the accident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any prior history of similar injuries or conditions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking digoxin for atrial fibrillation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals tenderness to palpation over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The remainder of the physical exam is unremarkable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An X-ray confirms a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes tramadol 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a finger splint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up X-ray in two weeks.
